explanation: Conversation topics have drifted from the stated objective
conversation_text: Dude, have you seen the stock market lately? Tesla's about to explode. I'm telling you, by end of next quarter, it'll hit $500 easy. Elon Musk is a genius, right? Whoa, $500? It's been hovering around $250 lately. What makes you so sure? Earnings report was okay, but not amazing. Nah, trust me. Robotaxis are coming. He announced it on Twitter—uh, X. That's huge. Everyone's sleeping on it. I'm putting like 20% of my portfolio in TSLA right now. Robotaxis sound cool, but they've been teasing that for years. Remember Cybercab? Delays everywhere. You got any analyst reports or something backing this? Analysts are idiots, man. They said the same about Bitcoin in 2018. Look where it is now! Elon's got the vision. Plus, China market's opening up again. Boom.
